mapper.select:
SELECT 'AFLO' AS recommendPanelContentType, 0 AS panelOrder, g.chnl_id AS recommendId, g.create_dtime AS avaliableDateTime, 1 AS dispSn, g.create_dtime, g.update_dtime AS disp_std_start_dt, 0 AS moodId, 0 AS contentCount FROM tb_character a INNER JOIN tb_aflo_character b ON a.character_no = b.character_no AND b.expire_dtime >= NOW() AND a.character_no = #{characterNo} AND a.character_type = 'AFLO' INNER JOIN tb_aflo c ON b.sale_vas_id = c.sale_vas_id AND c.del_yn = 'N' AND NOW() BETWEEN c.svc_start_dtime AND c.svc_end_dtime INNER JOIN tb_aflo d INNER JOIN tb_aflo_artist e ON d.aflo_id = e.aflo_id AND d.del_yn = 'N' INNER JOIN tb_aflo_chnl f ON e.aflo_artist_id = f.aflo_artist_id INNER JOIN tb_chnl g ON f.chnl_id = g.chnl_id AND g.chnl_type = 'AFLO' AND g.disp_status_type='Y' UNION ALL
SELECT 'RC_CF_TR' as recommendPanelContentType, 1 as panelOrder, a.rcmmd_mforu_id as recommendId, a.disp_std_end_dt as avaliableDateTime, a.disp_sn as dispSn, a.create_dtime, a.disp_std_start_dt, 0 as moodId, count(a.rcmmd_mforu_id) contentCount FROM tb_rcmmd_mforu a INNER JOIN tb_rcmmd_mforu_list b ON a.rcmmd_mforu_id = b.rcmmd_mforu_id INNER JOIN tb_track c ON b.track_id = c.track_id AND c.disp_status_yn = 'Y' AND now() BETWEEN c.disp_start_dtime AND c.disp_end_dtime INNER JOIN tb_svc_genre d ON a.svc_genre_id = d.svc_genre_id AND d.disp_status_type = 'Y' WHERE a.character_no = #{characterNo}
AND NOW() BETWEEN a.disp_std_start_dt AND a.disp_std_end_dt
AND NOW() BETWEEN a.disp_std_start_dt AND DATE_ADD(a.disp_std_start_dt, INTERVAL 30 DAY)
GROUP BY a.rcmmd_mforu_id HAVING contentCount >= #{rcmmdCfTrackDispStandardCount} UNION ALL SELECT 'RC_SML_TR' as recommendPanelContentType, 2 as panelOrder, a.rcmmd_similar_track_id as recommendId, a.disp_std_end_dt as avaliableDateTime, a.disp_sn as dispSn, a.create_dtime, a.disp_std_start_dt, 0 as moodId, count(b.rcmmd_similar_track_id) contentCount FROM tb_rcmmd_similar_track a INNER JOIN tb_rcmmd_similar_track_list b ON a.rcmmd_similar_track_id = b.rcmmd_similar_track_id INNER JOIN tb_track c ON b.track_id = c.track_id AND c.disp_status_yn = 'Y' AND now() BETWEEN c.disp_start_dtime AND c.disp_end_dtime WHERE a.character_no =#{characterNo}
AND NOW() BETWEEN a.disp_std_start_dt AND a.disp_std_end_dt
AND NOW() BETWEEN a.disp_std_start_dt AND DATE_ADD(a.disp_std_start_dt, INTERVAL 30 DAY)
GROUP BY a.rcmmd_similar_track_id HAVING contentCount >= #{similarTrackDispStandardCount} UNION ALL SELECT 'RC_ATST_TR' as recommendPanelContentType, 3 as panelOrder, a.rcmmd_artist_id as recommendId, a.disp_std_end_dt as avaliableDateTime, a.disp_sn as dispSn, a.create_dtime, a.disp_std_start_dt, 0 as moodId, 0 as contentCount FROM tb_rcmmd_artist a WHERE character_no = #{characterNo}
AND NOW() BETWEEN a.disp_std_start_dt AND a.disp_std_end_dt
AND NOW() BETWEEN a.disp_std_start_dt AND DATE_ADD(a.disp_std_start_dt, INTERVAL 30 DAY)
ORDER BY disp_std_start_dt DESC, panelOrder ASC, dispSn ASC

SELECT A.rcmmd_similar_track_id, B.track_nm as seedTrackNm, C.artist_nm as seedArtistNm, A.disp_sn, A.create_dtime, A.disp_std_start_dt FROM tb_rcmmd_similar_track A LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_track B ON A.seed_track_id = B.track_id LEFT OUTER JOIN ted_artist C ON B.reprsnt_artist_id = C.artist_id
WHERE A.rcmmd_similar_track_id=#{rcmmdId}

SELECT a.rcmmd_artist_id, b.artist_id , b.artist_type, c.artist_nm, d.size, d.url, a.create_dtime, a.disp_std_start_dt, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_rcmmd_artist_track_list aa JOIN tb_track bb ON bb.track_id = aa.track_id AND bb.disp_status_yn = 'Y' AND now() BETWEEN bb.disp_start_dtime AND bb.disp_end_dtime WHERE aa.rcmmd_artist_id = #{recommendArtistId} ) trackCount FROM tb_rcmmd_artist a INNER JOIN tb_rcmmd_artist_list b ON a.rcmmd_artist_id = b.rcmmd_artist_id INNER JOIN ted_artist c ON b.artist_id = c.artist_id LEFT OUTER JOIN ted_artistimage d ON c.artist_id = d.artist_id WHERE a.rcmmd_artist_id = #{recommendArtistId}
ORDER BY b.disp_sn ASC, a.rcmmd_artist_id ASC, c.artist_id ASC, d.size ASC
SELECT os_type, img_size size, img_url url, disp_sn FROM tb_rcmmd_img_mang WHERE rcmmd_type_id = 'ALL' AND dfk_type = 'EVERY' AND img_disp_type = 'DEFAULT'
SELECT GENRE_ID, count(*) AS GENRE_CNT FROM TB_CHARACTER_PREFER_ARTIST WHERE CHARACTER_NO = #{characterNo} GROUP BY GENRE_ID
SELECT CHARACTER_NO, GENRE_TYPE, GENRE_ID, ARTIST_ID FROM TB_CHARACTER_PREFER_ARTIST WHERE CHARACTER_NO = #{characterNo} AND GENRE_ID = #{genreId} GROUP BY CHARACTER_NO, ARTIST_ID ORDER BY ARTIST_ID

SELECT MSGT.SVC_GENRE_ID , MSGT.TRACK_ID FROM TB_CHARACTER_PREFER_GENRE CPG INNER JOIN TB_MAP_PREFER_GENRE_SVC_GENRE MPGSG ON CPG.PREFER_GENRE_ID = MPGSG.PREFER_GENRE_ID INNER JOIN TB_MAP_SVC_GENRE_TRACK MSGT ON MPGSG.SVC_GENRE_ID = MSGT.SVC_GENRE_ID INNER JOIN ( SELECT CHARACTER_NO, TRACK_ID, TOTAL_LIST_CNT FROM ( SELECT LISTEN_CNT.CHARACTER_NO, LISTEN_CNT.TRACK_ID, CASE WHEN CL.LIKE_TYPE IS NOT NULL THEN LISTEN_CNT.TOTAL_LISTEN_CNT + 10 ELSE LISTEN_CNT.TOTAL_LISTEN_CNT END AS TOTAL_LIST_CNT FROM ( SELECT CHARACTER_NO, TRACK_ID, SUM(LISTEN_CNT) AS TOTAL_LISTEN_CNT FROM TB_MOST_LISTEN_TRACK_BYDAY WHERE CHARACTER_NO = #{characterNo} AND LISTEN_DT >= ADDDATE(CURDATE(), -7) GROUP BY CHARACTER_NO, TRACK_ID ORDER BY NULL) LISTEN_CNT LEFT JOIN TB_CHARACTER_LIKE CL ON LISTEN_CNT.TRACK_ID = CL.LIKE_TYPE_ID AND CL.LIKE_TYPE = 'TRACK' AND CL.UPDATE_DTIME >= date_format(ADDDATE(CURDATE(), -7), '%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00') AND CL.CHARACTER_NO = #{characterNo}) J WHERE J.TOTAL_LIST_CNT >= 3) D ON MSGT.TRACK_ID = D.TRACK_ID WHERE CPG.CHARACTER_NO = #{characterNo} ORDER BY D.TOTAL_LIST_CNT DESC
SELECT b.svc_genre_nm, a.disp_std_start_dt, a.create_dtime FROM tb_rcmmd_mforu a INNER JOIN tb_svc_genre b ON a.svc_genre_id = b.svc_genre_id WHERE a.rcmmd_mforu_id = #{rcmmdId}

SELECT COUNT(*) duplicateCount, rcmmdId FROM ( SELECT COUNT(b.track_id) duplicateCount, MAX(a.rcmmd_similar_track_id) rcmmdId FROM tb_rcmmd_similar_track a INNER JOIN tb_rcmmd_similar_track_list b ON a.rcmmd_similar_track_id = b.rcmmd_similar_track_id INNER JOIN tb_track c ON b.track_id = c.track_id AND c.disp_status_yn = 'Y' AND now() BETWEEN c.disp_start_dtime AND c.disp_end_dtime WHERE a.character_no = #{characterNo} AND a.disp_std_start_dt <= NOW() AND a.disp_std_end_dt >= NOW() GROUP BY b.track_id HAVING duplicateCount >= 2 ) a

SELECT COUNT(*) duplicateCount, rcmmdId FROM ( SELECT COUNT(b.track_id) duplicateCount, MAX(a.rcmmd_prefer_genre_similar_track_id) rcmmdId FROM tb_rcmmd_prefer_genre_similar_track a INNER JOIN tb_rcmmd_prefer_genre_similar_track_list b ON a.rcmmd_prefer_genre_similar_track_id = b.rcmmd_prefer_genre_similar_track_id INNER JOIN tb_track c ON b.track_id = c.track_id AND c.disp_status_yn = 'Y' AND now() BETWEEN c.disp_start_dtime AND c.disp_end_dtime WHERE character_no = #{characterNo} AND disp_std_start_dt <= NOW() AND disp_std_end_dt >= NOW() GROUP BY b.track_id HAVING duplicateCount >=2 ) a

SELECT max(rcmmd_artist.disp_std_start_dt) FROM (SELECT rcmmd_artist_id, create_dtime, create_std_type, disp_std_start_dt FROM tb_rcmmd_artist WHERE character_no = #{characterNo} AND NOW() BETWEEN disp_std_start_dt AND DATE_ADD(disp_std_start_dt, INTERVAL 30 day) ) rcmmd_artist INNER JOIN tb_rcmmd_artist_list b ON rcmmd_artist.rcmmd_artist_id = b.rcmmd_artist_id INNER JOIN ted_artist c ON b.artist_id = c.artist_id INNER JOIN ted_artistimage d ON b.artist_id = d.artist_id

SELECT rcmmd_table.rcmmd_artist_id, rcmmd_table.artist_id, rcmmd_table.artist_type, rcmmd_table.artist_nm, rcmmd_table.create_dtime, rcmmd_table.create_std_type, rcmmd_table.disp_std_start_dt, rcmmd_table.size, rcmmd_table.url
FROM (SELECT @artistRowNum:=IF(@prevRcmmdId = rcmmd_artist_table.rcmmd_artist_id, @artistRowNum + 1, 1) AS rank, @prevRcmmdId:=rcmmd_artist_table.rcmmd_artist_id AS rcmmd_artist_id, rcmmd_artist_table.artist_id, rcmmd_artist_table.artist_type, rcmmd_artist_table.artist_nm, rcmmd_artist_table.create_dtime, rcmmd_artist_table.create_std_type, rcmmd_artist_table.disp_std_start_dt, rcmmd_artist_table.size, rcmmd_artist_table.url, rcmmd_artist_table.disp_sn
FROM (SELECT rcmmd_artist.rcmmd_artist_id, c.artist_id, b.artist_type, c.artist_nm, rcmmd_artist.create_dtime, rcmmd_artist.create_std_type, rcmmd_artist.disp_std_start_dt, d.size, d.url, b.disp_sn FROM (SELECT rcmmd_artist_id, create_dtime, create_std_type, disp_std_start_dt FROM tb_rcmmd_artist WHERE character_no = #{characterNo} AND DATE_FORMAT(disp_std_start_dt, '%Y%m%d') = #{recentDispStartDt} ) rcmmd_artist INNER JOIN tb_rcmmd_artist_list b ON rcmmd_artist.rcmmd_artist_id = b.rcmmd_artist_id INNER JOIN ted_artist c ON b.artist_id = c.artist_id INNER JOIN ted_artistimage d ON b.artist_id = d.artist_id JOIN (SELECT @artistRowNum:=0, @prevRcmmdId:=0) r ) rcmmd_artist_table ) rcmmd_table
ORDER BY rcmmd_table.disp_std_start_dt DESC, rcmmd_table.disp_sn ASC, rcmmd_table.rcmmd_artist_id ASC, rcmmd_table.artist_id ASC, rcmmd_table.size ASC

SELECT rcmmd_track_rank_table.rcmmd_id, rcmmd_track_rank_table.rcmmd_disp_sn, rcmmd_track_rank_table.track_id, rcmmd_track_rank_table.track_nm, rcmmd_track_rank_table.disp_sn, rcmmd_track_rank_table.reprsnt_artist_id, rcmmd_track_rank_table.agency_id, rcmmd_track_rank_table.create_dtime, rcmmd_track_rank_table.update_dtime, rcmmd_track_rank_table.img_size, rcmmd_track_rank_table.img_url, rcmmd_track_rank_table.svc_genre_id, rcmmd_track_rank_table.svc_genre_nm, rcmmd_track_rank_table.trackCount, rcmmd_track_rank_table.rcmmdCreateDtime, d.artist_id, d.artist_nm, a.album_id, b.album_img_size size, b.album_img_url url, e.artist_id reqArtistId, e.artist_nm reqArtistNm, rank FROM ( SELECT @curRank:=IF(@prevRcmmdId = rcmmd_track_table.rcmmd_id, @curRank + 1, 1) AS rank, @prevRcmmdId:=rcmmd_track_table.rcmmd_id, rcmmd_track_table.rcmmd_id, rcmmd_track_table.rcmmd_disp_sn, rcmmd_track_table.track_id, rcmmd_track_table.track_nm, rcmmd_track_table.disp_sn, rcmmd_track_table.album_id, rcmmd_track_table.reprsnt_artist_id, rcmmd_track_table.agency_id, rcmmd_track_table.create_dtime, rcmmd_track_table.update_dtime, rcmmd_track_table.img_size, rcmmd_track_table.img_url, rcmmd_track_table.svc_genre_id, rcmmd_track_table.svc_genre_nm, rcmmd_track_table.trackCount, rcmmd_track_table.rcmmdCreateDtime FROM ( SELECT -- 3. rcmmd_track_table starSELECT rcmmd_img_table.rcmmd_id, rcmmd_img_table.svc_genre_id, rcmmd_img_table.svc_genre_nm, rcmmd_img_table.disp_sn rcmmd_disp_sn, rcmmd_img_table.img_size, rcmmd_img_table.img_url, rcmmd_img_table.trackCount, rcmmd_img_table.rcmmdCreateDtime, b.track_id, b.disp_sn, c.track_nm, c.album_id, c.reprsnt_artist_id, c.agency_id, c.create_dtime, c.update_dtime FROM ( -- 2. rcmmd_img_table start SELECT rcmmd_table.rcmmd_id, rcmmd_table.svc_genre_id, rcmmd_table.svc_genre_nm, rcmmd_table.disp_sn, rcmmd_table.trackCount, rcmmd_table.rcmmdCreateDtime, b.img_size, b.img_url FROM ( -- 1. rcmmd_table start SELECT rcmmd_mforu_id rcmmd_id, a.svc_genre_id, b.svc_genre_nm, disp_sn, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_rcmmd_mforu_list aa JOIN tb_track bb ON aa.track_id = bb.track_id AND bb.disp_status_yn = 'Y' AND now() BETWEEN bb.disp_start_dtime AND bb.disp_end_dtime WHERE aa.rcmmd_mforu_id = a.rcmmd_mforu_id ) trackCount, a.disp_std_start_dt rcmmdCreateDtime FROM tb_rcmmd_mforu a INNER JOIN tb_svc_genre b ON a.svc_genre_id = b.svc_genre_id
WHERE a.character_no = #{characterNo} AND NOW() BETWEEN a.disp_std_start_dt AND DATE_ADD(a.disp_std_start_dt, INTERVAL 30 DAY)
ORDER BY a.create_dtime DESC LIMIT #{recommendLimitSize} -- 1. rcmmd_table end; ) rcmmd_table LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_map_img_rcmmd_img b ON rcmmd_table.svc_genre_id = b.img_content_id AND b.rcmmd_type_id = 'RC_CF_TR' AND b.os_type = #{osType} AND b.img_disp_type = 'MAIN_TOP' AND b.img_content_type = 'GENRE'
ORDER BY rcmmd_table.disp_sn -- 2. rcmmd_img_table end ) rcmmd_img_table INNER JOIN tb_rcmmd_mforu_list b ON rcmmd_img_table.rcmmd_id = b.rcmmd_mforu_id INNER JOIN tb_track c ON b.track_id = c.track_id JOIN (SELECT @curRank:=0, @prevRcmmdId:=0) r WHERE c.disp_status_yn = 'Y'AND now() BETWEEN c.disp_start_dtime AND c.disp_end_dtime ORDER BY rcmmd_img_table.rcmmd_id DESC, b.disp_sn -- 3. rcmmd_track_table end ) rcmmd_track_table -- 4. rcmmd_tank_table end ) rcmmd_track_rank_table JOIN ted_album a ON rcmmd_track_rank_table.album_id = a.album_id AND a.disp_status_yn= 'Y' AND now() BETWEEN a.disp_start_dtime AND a.disp_end_dtime LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_album_img b ON a.album_id = b.album_id LEFT OUTER JOIN ted_trackartist c ON rcmmd_track_rank_table.track_id =c.track_id AND c.rp_yn = 'Y' LEFT OUTER JOIN ted_artist d ON c.artist_id = d.artist_id LEFT OUTER JOIN ted_artist e ON e.artist_id = rcmmd_track_rank_table.reprsnt_artist_id WHERE rank <= #{trackLimitSize};

SELECT rcmmd_track_rank_table.rcmmd_id, rcmmd_track_rank_table.rcmmd_disp_sn, rcmmd_track_rank_table.track_id, rcmmd_track_rank_table.track_nm, rcmmd_track_rank_table.disp_sn, rcmmd_track_rank_table.reprsnt_artist_id, rcmmd_track_rank_table.agency_id, rcmmd_track_rank_table.create_dtime, rcmmd_track_rank_table.update_dtime, rcmmd_track_rank_table.img_size, rcmmd_track_rank_table.img_url, rcmmd_track_rank_table.rcmmdCreateDtime, rcmmd_track_rank_table.svc_genre_id, rcmmd_track_rank_table.svc_genre_nm, rcmmd_track_rank_table.trackCount, rcmmd_track_rank_table.seedArtistNm, rcmmd_track_rank_table.seedTrackNm, d.artist_id, d.artist_nm, a.album_id, b.album_img_size size, b.album_img_url url, e.artist_id reqArtistId, e.artist_nm reqArtistNm, rank FROM ( -- 4. rcmmd_rank_table start SELECT @curRank:=IF(@prevRcmmdId = rcmmd_track_table.rcmmd_id, @curRank + 1, 1) AS rank, @prevRcmmdId:=rcmmd_track_table.rcmmd_id, rcmmd_track_table.rcmmd_id, rcmmd_track_table.rcmmd_disp_sn, rcmmd_track_table.track_id, rcmmd_track_table.track_nm, rcmmd_track_table.disp_sn, rcmmd_track_table.album_id, rcmmd_track_table.reprsnt_artist_id, rcmmd_track_table.agency_id, rcmmd_track_table.create_dtime, rcmmd_track_table.update_dtime, rcmmd_track_table.img_size, rcmmd_track_table.img_url, rcmmd_track_table.rcmmdCreateDtime, rcmmd_track_table.svc_genre_id, rcmmd_track_table.svc_genre_nm, rcmmd_track_table.trackCount, rcmmd_track_table.seedArtistNm, rcmmd_track_table.seedTrackNm FROM ( -- 3. rcmmd_track_table start SELECT rcmmd_img_table.rcmmd_id, rcmmd_img_table.svc_genre_id, rcmmd_img_table.svc_genre_nm, rcmmd_img_table.disp_sn rcmmd_disp_sn, rcmmd_img_table.img_size, rcmmd_img_table.img_url, rcmmd_img_table.rcmmdCreateDtime, rcmmd_img_table.trackCount, rcmmd_img_table.seedArtistNm, rcmmd_img_table.seedTrackNm, b.track_id, b.disp_sn, c.album_id, c.track_nm, c.reprsnt_artist_id, c.agency_id, c.create_dtime, c.update_dtime FROM ( -- 2. rcmmd_img_table start SELECT rcmmd_table.rcmmd_id, rcmmd_table.svc_genre_id, rcmmd_table.svc_genre_nm, rcmmd_table.disp_sn, rcmmd_table.rcmmdCreateDtime, rcmmd_table.trackCount, rcmmd_table.seedArtistNm, rcmmd_table.seedTrackNm, b.img_size, b.img_url FROM ( -- 1. rcmmd_table start SELECT rcmmd_similar_track_id rcmmd_id, 0 as svc_genre_id, '' as svc_genre_nm, disp_sn, CASE DAYOFWEEK(NOW()) WHEN '1' THEN 'SUN' WHEN '2' THEN 'MON' WHEN '3' THEN 'TUE' WHEN '4' THEN 'WED' WHEN '5' THEN 'THU' WHEN '6' THEN 'FRI' WHEN '7' THEN 'SAT' END AS week, a.disp_std_start_dt AS rcmmdCreateDtime, a.disp_sn panel_disp_sn, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_rcmmd_similar_track_list aa JOIN tb_track bb ON bb.track_id = aa.track_id AND bb.disp_status_yn = 'Y' AND now() BETWEEN bb.disp_start_dtime AND bb.disp_end_dtime WHERE aa.rcmmd_similar_track_id = a.rcmmd_similar_track_id ) trackCount,
(select group_concat(B.artist_nm) from ted_trackartist A inner join ted_artist B on A.artist_id = B.artist_id where A.track_id = a.seed_track_id) AS seedArtistNm, (select A.track_nm from tb_track A where A.track_id = a.seed_track_id AND A.disp_status_yn = 'Y' AND now() BETWEEN A.disp_start_dtime AND A.disp_end_dtime) as seedTrackNm FROM tb_rcmmd_similar_track a WHERE a.character_no = #{characterNo} AND NOW() BETWEEN a.disp_std_start_dt AND DATE_ADD(a.disp_std_start_dt, INTERVAL 30 DAY)
ORDER BY a.create_dtime DESC LIMIT #{recommendLimitSize} -- 1. rcmmd_table end; ) rcmmd_table LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_rcmmd_img_mang b ON rcmmd_table.week = b.dfk_type AND rcmmd_table.panel_disp_sn = b.disp_sn AND b.rcmmd_type_id = 'RC_SML_TR' AND b.img_disp_type = 'MAIN_TOP' AND b.os_type = #{osType} ORDER BY rcmmd_table.disp_sn ASC
-- 2. rcmmd_img_table end ) rcmmd_img_table INNER JOIN tb_rcmmd_similar_track_list b ON rcmmd_img_table.rcmmd_id = b.rcmmd_similar_track_id INNER JOIN tb_track c ON b.track_id = c.track_id JOIN (SELECT @curRank:=0, @prevRcmmdId:=0) r
WHERE c.disp_status_yn = 'Y' AND now() BETWEEN c.disp_start_dtime AND c.disp_end_dtime ORDER BY rcmmd_img_table.rcmmd_id DESC, b.disp_sn ASC -- 3. rcmmd_track_table end ) rcmmd_track_table -- 4. rcmmd_tank_table end ) rcmmd_track_rank_table JOIN ted_album a ON rcmmd_track_rank_table.album_id = a.album_id AND a.disp_status_yn= 'Y' AND now() BETWEEN a.disp_start_dtime AND a.disp_end_dtime LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_album_img b ON a.album_id = b.album_id LEFT OUTER JOIN ted_trackartist c ON rcmmd_track_rank_table.track_id =c.track_id AND c.rp_yn = 'Y' LEFT OUTER JOIN ted_artist d ON c.artist_id = d.artist_id LEFT OUTER JOIN ted_artist e ON e.artist_id = rcmmd_track_rank_table.reprsnt_artist_id WHERE rank <= #{trackLimitSize}

SELECT img_url as url, 600 as size
FROM tb_pannel_img
WHERE pannel_type = 'PREFER_GENRE_CHNL' AND os_type = #{osType}
ORDER BY rand() LIMIT 5
